findings.title: Gadgets discovered but CFI policy eliminates all viable pivot sequences
findings.statement: The parser OOB write primitive is confirmed with 4-byte reach past the vtable pointer. ROPgadget found 200+ raw gadgets, but after filtering indirect branches for CFI compliance only 8 gadgets survive. None provide a stack pivot (xchg/mov rsp sequences all land on non-CFI-valid addresses). Without a pivot, the 4-byte write cannot be chained into register control. The exploit path is blocked by the combination of narrow write reach and aggressive CFI enforcement.

evidence.summary: exploit_ropgadget: 200+ raw gadgets, 8 CFI-surviving, no usable pivot; disasm_radare2_gadgets confirms no xchg/mov rsp in valid landing pads
